metadata.description: Personal OS data plugins: health, reflection, intelligence, and knowledge management

plugins.name: health-insights
plugins.description: Personal health intelligence: ingest Apple Health data, establish baselines, generate AI-driven insights

plugins.name: session-reflect
plugins.description: AI collaboration coach: analyzes Claude Code and Codex sessions to help you improve prompting, workflow, and AI collaboration skills

plugins.name: domain-intel
plugins.description: Domain intelligence engine: automated collection, AI analysis, and trend synthesis from GitHub, Product Hunt, RSS, and more

plugins.name: youtube-scout
plugins.description: YouTube video intelligence: scrapes recommended feed and topic search, extracts transcripts, scores videos with Claude AI on 6 quality dimensions, exports IEF-compliant insights

plugins.name: pkos
plugins.description: Personal Knowledge Operating System: automated knowledge compilation for Obsidian vaults, IEF ingestion, digest generation, and cross-source signal aggregation

plugins.name: portfolio-lens
plugins.description: Indie project portfolio management: scan, progress pulse, verdict refresh, reprioritize

plugins.name: tts-toolkit
plugins.description: Unified TTS skill across Volcengine (Doubao) and MiniMax with cross-vendor voice catalog, provider-quirk references, and chunk/merge scripts for long-form audio.

plugins.name: podcast-prep
plugins.description: Daily podcast prep orchestrator: topic dedup, angle rotation, MinHash text dedup, PKOS serendipity, contrarian source picker
